sectionTitle: A Marketplace Built for the Community
sectionSubtitle: Eight features that make HeadyStore the most developer-friendly, creator-rewarding, and business-ready AI marketplace ever built.

features.title: Agent Marketplace
features.description: Browse, preview, and install pre-configured AI agents for any cognitive archetype — Owl agents for research and analysis, Eagle agents for strategic planning, Dolphin agents for customer communication, Rabbit agents for rapid task execution, Ant agents for workflow coordination, Elephant agents for knowledge management, and Beaver agents for building and automation. Each agent comes pre-trained with domain-specific skills and ready to deploy.

features.title: Skill Templates
features.description: Pre-built HeadyFlow workflow templates, agent skill packages, and prompt engineering patterns for every common business use case — customer support automation, content generation pipelines, data analysis workflows, code review agents, and more. Each template is peer-reviewed, version-controlled, and tested against the current Heady runtime version before listing.

features.title: One-Click Install
features.description: Every HeadyStore package installs with a single command from the Heady CLI or a single button click from the HeadyWeb portal. Dependencies resolve automatically, compatibility is verified against your Heady runtime version, and rollback is supported if any package conflicts with your existing configuration. No YAML wrangling, no manual configuration.

features.title: Revenue Share Program
features.description: HeadyStore pays publishers 70% of all revenue generated by their packages — matching the industry-leading App Store model for the AI ecosystem. Payments are processed monthly via Stripe. Free packages can be monetized through premium upgrade tiers, usage-based metering, or support subscriptions. Enterprise licensing for private redistribution is also supported.

features.title: Community Ratings
features.description: Every HeadyStore package includes verified community ratings, usage statistics, and structured reviews from Heady users who have actually installed and used the package. Ratings are weighted by reviewer reputation and usage recency. Publisher responses to reviews are displayed alongside the original review for full transparency.

features.title: Version Control
features.description: HeadyStore packages follow semantic versioning (semver) enforced at the registry level. Publishers manage releases via Git tags and the Heady CLI. Consumers can pin to specific versions, subscribe to automatic patch updates only, or track major/minor releases with manual approval. Full changelog history is displayed on every package listing.

features.title: Private Libraries
features.description: Organizations on Business and Enterprise plans can maintain private HeadyStore registries for internal packages — proprietary agents, company-specific templates, and internal MCP servers — accessible only to their Heady users. Private libraries support the same one-click install, version control, and dependency resolution as the public marketplace.

features.title: Enterprise Bundles
features.description: HeadyStore will offer curated industry bundles — pre-vetted collections of agents, templates, and connectors tailored for specific verticals: Legal AI Bundle, Healthcare AI Bundle, Financial Services Bundle, eCommerce Bundle, and more. Enterprise bundles include support SLAs, compatibility guarantees, and regular updates from the Heady enterprise team.
